channel.title: Flinker Services Terms on Flinker | The built-environment layer for Microsoft 365
channel.description: Recent content in Flinker Services Terms on Flinker | The built-environment layer for Microsoft 365

item.title: Flinker Services Terms (v2026-04)
item.description:
Version: v2026-04 Effective date: 2026-03-06
Back to latest Download PDF Print

What’s new in v2026-04: Schedule B.3 — Implementation Engagements — is now defined. B.2 (Advisory Engagements) remains reserved. All other sections are unchanged from v2026-03.

Table of Contents

  1. Scope and precedence
  2. Support Plans (Schedule A) — applicability and precedence
  3. Definitions
  4. Deliverables and delivery windows
  5. What is included vs excluded
  6. Change control (scope expansion)
  7. Support Requests (Cases) — operating rules
  8. Customer responsibilities (Prerequisites)
  9. Response targets (best effort)
  10. Evaluation and production licenses
  11. Tier trigger (Standard vs Enterprise) — Professional Services
  12. Fees, invoicing, and payment
  13. Data and confidentiality (summary)
  14. Intellectual property
  15. Limitation of liability
  16. Governing law and venue
  17. Schedule B: Service Types & Delivery Specifications
    • B.1 Pilot & Setup Engagements
    • B.2 Advisory Engagements (reserved)
    • B.3 Implementation Engagements

1. Scope and precedence

These Flinker Services Terms (v2026-04) (“Terms”) apply to the professional services and case-capped services described in the quote (“Services”) provided by Flinker GmbH (“Flinker”) to the customer (“Customer”).

item.title: Flinker Services Terms (v2026-03)
item.description:
Version: v2026-03 Effective date: 2026-02-25
Back to latest Download PDF Print

What’s new in v2026-03: Schedule B: Service Types & Delivery Specifications is added. B.1 (Pilot & Setup Engagements) is now fully defined — covering scope, delivery phases, bundled production licences, post-handover cases, and configuration adjustment rounds. B.2 (Advisory) and B.3 (Implementation) are reserved. New definitions for Pilot Engagement, Bundled Production Licence, and Configuration Adjustment Round.

item.title: Flinker Services Terms (v2026-02)
item.description:
Version: v2026-02 Effective date: 2026-01-26
Back to latest Download PDF Print

What’s new in v2026-02: Support Plans (Schedule A) integration — separates Support Plan governance from case-capped Services throughout. Adds definitions for Support Plans, Schedule A, and Business Days. Updates response targets and tier trigger sections.

Table of Contents

  1. Scope and precedence
  2. Support Plans (Schedule A) — applicability and precedence
  3. Definitions
  4. Deliverables and delivery windows
  5. What is included vs excluded
  6. Change control (scope expansion)
  7. Support Requests (Cases) — operating rules
  8. Customer responsibilities (Prerequisites)
  9. Response targets (best effort)
  10. Evaluation and production licenses
  11. Tier trigger (Standard vs Enterprise) — Professional Services
  12. Fees, invoicing, and payment
  13. Data and confidentiality (summary)
  14. Intellectual property
  15. Limitation of liability
  16. Governing law and venue

1. Scope and precedence

These Flinker Services Terms (v2026-02) (“Terms”) apply to the professional services and case-capped services described in the quote (“Services”) provided by Flinker GmbH (“Flinker”) to the customer (“Customer”).

item.title: Flinker Services Terms (v2026-01)
item.description:
Version: v2026-01 Archived Effective date: 2026-01-14
Back to latest Download PDF Print

Initial release. First published version of the Flinker Services Terms.

This version is archived. Please refer to the latest version here: /legal/services-terms/.

Table of Contents

  1. Scope and precedence
  2. Definitions
  3. Deliverables and delivery windows
  4. What is included vs excluded
  5. Change control (scope expansion)
  6. Support Requests (Cases) — operating rules
  7. Customer responsibilities (Prerequisites)
  8. Response targets (best effort)
  9. Evaluation and production licenses
  10. Tier trigger (Standard vs Enterprise)
  11. Fees, invoicing, and payment
  12. Data and confidentiality (summary)
  13. Intellectual property
  14. Limitation of liability
  15. Governing law and venue

1. Scope and precedence

These Flinker Services Terms (v2026-01) (“Terms”) apply to the services described in the quote (“Services”) provided by Flinker GmbH (“Flinker”) to the customer (“Customer”). If the parties have a signed master agreement or SOW that conflicts with these Terms, the signed agreement prevails.

item.title: Flinker Services Terms (v2026)
item.description:
This legacy link points to a canonical versioned page. If you are not redirected automatically, please open /legal/services-terms/v2026-01/.
Back to latest Download PDF Print

Table of Contents

  1. Scope and precedence
  2. Definitions
  3. Deliverables and delivery windows
  4. What is included vs excluded
  5. Change control (scope expansion)
  6. Support Requests (Cases) — operating rules
  7. Customer responsibilities (Prerequisites)
  8. Response targets (best effort)
  9. Evaluation and production licenses
  10. Tier trigger (Standard vs Enterprise)
  11. Fees, invoicing, and payment
  12. Data and confidentiality (summary)
  13. Intellectual property
  14. Limitation of liability
  15. Governing law and venue

1. Scope and precedence

These Flinker Services Terms (v2026) (“Terms”) apply to the services described in the quote (“Services”) provided by Flinker GmbH (“Flinker”) to the customer (“Customer”). If the parties have a signed master agreement or SOW that conflicts with these Terms, the signed agreement prevails.
